name: M5RadioStream — WiFi Internet Radio
description: WiFi internet radio for M5Stack Core1 Basic. Streams 8 classic/OTR stations from ROKiT Radio Network. Retro 1940s skin. BtnA=Sound settings (Bass/Treble/Volume). BtnB=Cycle station. BtnC=Cycle volume (0-10, 0=mute). Hold BtnA on boot to re-enter WiFi setup. Based on winRadio by Volos Projects.
author: CoreyMillia
